meta.tier_source: measured by diffing against a `wp --skip-plugins=elementor-pro` dump

common_controls.note: Registered into every widget's own stack by Elementor, so they behave identically on all of them. Stored once here. Widgets listing `common_missing` are the documented exceptions. NOTE the per-control `tier`: Elementor Pro injects some of these (Motion FX, Sticky, Custom CSS, Display Conditions, Custom Attributes) into free widgets, so 'this control is on the free Heading widget' does NOT mean it works without Pro.
